purpose: Canonical lifecycle, scheduling, curation, expiry, recovery, delivery-dispatch, and billing-cycle controller for MMG Knowledge Subscription packages.

plan_schedule_contract.five_week_month_rule: The entitlement remains four packages and eight assets. No fifth package is created.

auto_confirm_preconditions: every title revalidates as subscription eligible

tick_order: create or resolve the billing cycle
create the exact plan package windows
curate and open due future-package windows

deterministic_fallback.purpose: Temporary deterministic selection until Kairos recommendation ranking is implemented.

delivery_contract.confirmation_source: MMG Knowledge Library Picker or expiry auto-confirmation
delivery_contract.confirmed_to_delivery_ready: A delivery dispatcher accepts the package and returns a dispatch ID.
delivery_contract.delivery_ready_to_delivered: The delivery adapter acknowledges a customer-visible delivery reference.
delivery_contract.my_library_ownership: Active ownership and delivery grants are created by the atomic confirmation transaction.

cycle_rollover_contract.prior_cycle_rule: Prior scheduled or active cycles whose end is at or before the next period start are completed.
cycle_rollover_contract.capacity_reset: The new cycle receives exactly the locked plan package and asset totals.
cycle_rollover_contract.plan_change_rule: The cycle is generated from the reconciled Shopify plan code for that billing period.

security_contract: Do not expose the controller endpoint as a public customer mutation surface.
Require server-to-server authorization for every controller action.
Never accept customer identity, subscription identity, cycle capacity, or entitlement totals from the browser.
Use parameterized SQL and database transactions for every state transition.
Use expected window versions for concurrent state changes.
Use controller run IDs, picker request IDs, window IDs, and dispatch IDs as idempotency boundaries.
Return private no-store responses from the internal HTTP handler.
Record lifecycle transitions, recovery requirements, dispatches, deliveries, and failures as entitlement audit events.

integration_sequence.previous_component: MMG Entitlement Counter and Ownership-Resolution Persistence
subsequent_components: Live Shopify provisioning and end-to-end deployment

release_gates: The delivery-window database migration is reviewed, backed up, and applied.
The internal controller endpoint is connected to a protected scheduled runtime.
Shopify subscription contract reconciliation populates current period start, current period end, and plan code.
The production delivery dispatcher is idempotent by window ID.
The production delivery adapter can acknowledge a customer-visible delivery reference.
The first-package recovery workflow is available to authorized support or Kairos operations.
At least two verified subscription-selectable digital assets exist for every package opening.
Weekly cycles create exactly four packages, including five-week calendar months.
Expiry auto-confirmation passes eligibility, ownership, version, idempotency, and rollback tests against real PostgreSQL.
Observability alerts on controller failures, recovery-required windows, delivery queue failures, and stale scheduled windows are active.
